title: Racosperma pubicostum
taxonomy: Racosperma pubicostum is classified in the family Fabaceae, which is commonly known as the legume family. It belongs to the genus Racosperma, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to Australia. Racosperma pubicostum is a type of shrub or tree that is typically found in the wild in various parts of Australia. The classification of Racosperma pubicostum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the division Magnoliophyta, and then the class Rosopsida. Within the class Rosopsida, it is classified into the order Fabales.
